title: Provider
description: Provider schema from Axway Amplify Platform API

oneOf.description: Flag indicating if `marketplace_admin` role members in all teams can administer the provider marketplace.
`guid` of a selected team whose `marketplace_admin` role members can administer the provider marketplace.

consume_teams.description: Preference for which org members can consume the provider marketplace.

value.description: Indicates if `consumer` role members in all teams can consume the provider marketplace.
`guid` of a selected teams whose `consumer` role members can consume the provider marketplace.
`consumer` role members in teams with any value in its `tags` can consume the provider marketplace.

type.description: Setting for how to apply consumption preference value.

publish_teams.description: Preference for which org members can publish products to the provider marketplace.

value.description: Indicates if `catalog_manager` role members in all teams can publish to the provider marketplace.
`guid` of a selected teams whose `catalog_manager` role members can publish to the provider marketplace.
`catalog_manager` role members in teams with any value in its `tags` can publish to the provider marketplace.

type.description: Setting for how to apply publication preference value.

enabled.description: Whether AI integration is enabled for the provider marketplace.

embedded.description: Whether AI integration uses built-in LLM (or customer hosted).

key.description: API key of customer hosted LLM.

key_set.description: Date and time when API key was last set.

stream.description: Whether LLM supports SSE events stream.

appearance.description: Appearance settings for the provider marketplace.

favicon.description: URL of the provider marketplace favicon.

logo.description: URL of the provider marketplace logo.

theme_primary_alt.description: Supplementary content color for primary action controls.

theme_secondary_alt.description: Supplementary content color for secondary action controls.

theme_tertiary_alt.description: Supplementary content color for tertiary action controls.

theme_danger_alt.description: Supplementary content color for danger state elements.

theme_info_alt.description: Supplementary content color for info state elements.

theme_success_alt.description: Supplementary content color for success state elements.

theme_warning_alt.description: Supplementary content color for warning state elements.

theme_button_text.description: Element color for heading button text.

theme_container_brd.description: Element color for container borders and separators.

theme_top_nav.description: Color for top navigation menu text.

theme_top_nav_bg_direction.description: Direction for the top navigation menu background gradient.

theme_top_nav_bg_end.description: Ending color for top navigation menu background.

theme_top_nav_bg_fill.description: Fill format for the top navigation menu background.

theme_top_nav_bg_start.description: Starting color for top navigation menu background.

theme_top_nav_icon.description: Color for top navigation menu icons.

theme_top_nav_menu_bg.description: Color for top navigation menu background.

theme_left_nav.description: Color for left navigation menu text.

theme_left_nav_active.description: Color for left navigation menu active item text.

theme_left_nav_active_bg.description: Color for left navigation menu active item background.

theme_left_nav_bg.description: Color for left navigation menu background.

billing.description: Billing integration settings for the provider marketplace.

enabled.description: Whether billing integration is enabled for the provider marketplace.

key.description: Billing integration vendor API key; required for vendor other than `custom`.

key_set.description: Date billing integration vendor key was set.

portal_url.description: URL of vendor hosted customer portal; optional for vendor `stripe`.

signature.description: Billing integration vendor webhook signature or secret key; required for vendor other than `custom`.

signature_set.description: Date billing integration vendor webhook signature was set.

url.description: Billing integration vendor region or environment URL; required for vendor `myFatoorah`.

vendor.description: Billing integration vendor for the provider marketplace.

certificate_expires.description: Expiry date of certificate provided for marketplace domain.

console.description: Console page settings for the provider marketplace.

getting_started.description: Getting Started section settings for the provider marketplace console page.

enabled.description: Whether Getting Started section is enabled for the provider marketplace console page.

type.description: Type of document to display on Getting Started section on the provider marketplace console page.

consumer.description: Whether to allow authenticated consumer org user access to the marketplace.

consumer_approve.description: Whether to Require newly registered consumer organizations in the marketplace to require approval from an organization administrator.

description.description: Description of the provider marketplace instance.

footer.description: Appearance and content settings for the provider marketplace common footer element.

background.description: Fill format for the footer background.

background_direction.description: Direction for the footer background gradient.

brd.description: Color for footer borders and dividers.

items.description: Elements shown in the footer block.

guid.description: Identifier of the provider marketplace instance.

help_menu.description: Content shown in the navigation bar help menu.

help_menu_icon.description: Icon displayed in the navigation bar to show the help menu.

homepage.description: Homepage settings for the provider marketplace.

enabled.description: Whether homepage is enabled for the provider marketplace.

default_page.description: Which path to display when homepage is not shown; `null` displays "Browse Products".

sort.description: Sorting setting for the provider marketplace featured content section.

direction.description: Direction for the background color gradient.

image_position.description: Background image position for the content.

image_size.description: Background image size for the content.

url.description: Background image URL for the content.
URL or relative path for the link.

url_type.description: Link type for the button URL.

tags.description: The tags determining which products to show when `filter` is set to `"tags".`

filter.description: Displayed products setting for the provider marketplace featured products section.

sort.description: Sorting setting for the provider marketplace featured products section.

visibility.description: Item visibility. Always shown: 0, Signed in: 1, Signed out: 2

width.description: Item width. Full width: 0, Full width aligned to grid: 5, Column width: 1 - 4.

idp.description: Whether to allow consumer organizations in the marketplace to establish custom Identity Providers.

idp_hint.description: Identity Provider `guid` to use for sign in attempts originating from the marketplace. Cannot be set at the same time as `consumer`.

lang.description: Internationalization settings for the provider marketplace.

default.description: Default language to use for users of the marketplace.

products.description: Behavior for display of products in the marketplace based on translation state.

name.description: Name of the provider marketplace instance.

name_gender.description: Gender of the `name` of the provider marketplace instance.

nav_items.description: Links added in the common navigation menu.

oauth.description: OAuth 2.0 client settings for the provider marketplace's consumer users.

github.description: Settings for the provider marketplace's GitHub OAuth 2.0 client.

enabled.description: Whether "Sign in with GitHub" is enabled for the provider marketplace's consumer users.

client_id.description: Client ID of the registered application within GitHub.

client_secret.description: Client secret for the registered application within GitHub.

gitlab.description: Settings for the provider marketplace's GitLab OAuth 2.0 client.

enabled.description: Whether "Sign in with GitLab" is enabled for the provider marketplace's consumer users.

client_id.description: Application ID of the registered application within GitLab.

client_secret.description: Application Secret for the registered application within GitLab.

google.description: Settings for the provider marketplace's Google OAuth 2.0 client.

enabled.description: Whether "Sign in with Google" is enabled for the provider marketplace's consumer users.

client_id.description: Client ID of the registered OAuth 2.0 Credentials within Google.

client_secret.description: Client secret for the registered OAuth 2.0 Credentials within Google.

onboarding.description: Onboarding data capture settings for the provider marketplace.

enabled.description: Whether onboarding data capture feature is enabled for the provider marketplace.

items.description: Onboarding fields to capture for consumer orgs of the provider marketplace.

maxlen.description: Maximum value length for the element.

org_guid.description: `guid` of the organization the provider marketplace belongs to.

public.description: Whether the provider marketplace allows access to unauthenticated users or users authenticated to orgs other than the provider org.

reviews.description: Ratings & Reviews settings for the provider marketplace.

enabled.description: Whether Ratings & Reviews are enabled for the provider marketplace.

char_limit.description: Character limit for written feedback for products or services in the provider marketplace.

flagged_handling.description: How reported review content is handled within the provider marketplace

instructions.description: Review guidelines and policies within the provider marketplace.

moderation_process.description: Which type of moderation process is to be used for reviews in the provider marketplace

permissions.description: Who is allowed to provide feedback for products or services in the provider marketplace.

public_responses.description: Whether to enable public responses to reviews in the provider marketplace.

response_time.description: Expected response time for feedback in the provider marketplace, in `response_time_unit`.

response_time_unit.description: Unit of time that `response_time` correlates to.

google_site_verification_id.description: Site Verification ID for Google Search Console integration.

indexing_enabled.description: Whether indexing by search engines is enabled for the marketplace.

signup.description: Whether to allow self-service sign up for consumer organizations in the marketplace.

sitename.description: Page title of the provider marketplace instance.

sitename_gender.description: Gender of the `sitename` of the provider marketplace instance.

subdomain.description: Subdomain on which the provider marketplace can be accessed.

terms.description: Whether the provider marketplace access should be gated on acceptance of Terms & Conditions.

terms_url.description: URL of the provider marketplace Terms & Conditions.

url.description: Fully qualified domain name on which the provider marketplace can be accessed.

versions.description: Product version settings for the provider marketplace.

custom.description: Whether custom product versions are displayed in the provider marketplace.

display.description: What product version types will be displayed in the provider marketplace.
